title: Xi (disambiguation)
content:
'''Xi''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Xi Char]]''', home of the '''[[Xi Charrian]]''' people and site of the '''[[Xi Char Cathedral factories]]''' which manufactured the [[Variable Geometry Self-Propelled Battle Droid, Mark I]]
*The '''[[Xi-class light shuttle|''Xi''-class light shuttle]]''', used by the [[First Order]]

==Legends==
*[[Xi (Class-A cargo container)|'''''Xi''''']], a [[Class-A cargo container]] present for a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cargo pickup over [[Retep III]]
*[[Xi 1 (Mon Calamari)|'''''Xi 1''''']], a [[Cargo container/Legends|cargo container]] from which [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] were [[Rescue at Mon Calamari|rescued]] by the Rebel [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Citadel 1]]''
*[[Xi 2 (cargo canister)|'''''Xi 2''''']], a [[cargo canister]] delivered by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] to [[Harlequin Station]]
*'''''[[Xi 4]]''''', a [[Class-B cargo container]]
*'''[[Xi group]]''', a designator for cargo container groups used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and Rebel Alliance that included [[Xi 1 (lonsigar)|'''''Xi 1''''']], [[Xi 2 (lonsigar)|'''''Xi 2''''']], and '''''[[Xi 3]]'''''
*The [[Xi Char/Legends|'''Xi Char''']] religious order of the [[Xi Charrian/Legends|'''Xi Charrian''']] people, or [[Xi Char (language)|'''Xi Char''']], their [[Language/Legends|language]]
{{Disambig}}
